falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index drops by 5% from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline would contradict the pattern's implied bottom formation, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff Score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in blowoff pressure would indicate a forced sell-off, refuting the current HOLD and suggesting a deeper downturn.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume in the S&P 500 remains below 10% of August 2024 daily averages for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Lack of participation would disprove the pattern's validity, as bottoms typically require increased volume for confirmation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
